2026-04-21T05:37:52.8065759Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-21T05:37:52.8066338Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-21T05:37:52.8066767Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-21T05:37:52.8067139Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-21T05:37:52.8067460Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T05:37:52.8067696Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-21T05:37:52.8067853Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-21T05:37:52.8068026Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-21T05:37:52.8068192Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-21T05:37:52.8068417Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-21T05:37:52.8068617Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T05:37:52.8068899Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-21T05:37:52.8069154Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). If auto-targeting fails (e.g., for schedule or workflow_dispatch triggers), the tool call will fail with an error.","type":["number","string"]},"reply_to_id":{"description":"Node ID of the discussion comment to reply to, enabling threaded discussion comments. section and `ContentUnderstandingGetUsage` snippet\\n- Updated `tests/samples/Sample03_AnalyzeInvoice.cs` with the corresponding `#region Snippet:ContentUnderstandingGetUsage` / `#endregion` block\\n\\nThe main **README.md** was **not** updated and does not mention the new class or extension method at all.\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- `AnalyzeUsageDetails` is not listed in the **Main classes** section of `README.md`\\n- `AnalyzeOperationExtensions.GetUsage()` is not referenced anywhere in `README.md`\\n- The **Examples** section of `README.md` describes Sample 03 as \\u0026#34;Domain-Specific Analysis — Extract structured fields from invoices\\u0026#34; but does not mention that Sample 03 now also demonstrates retrieving usage/billing details\\n- No snippet placeholder for `ContentUnderstandingGetUsage` exists in `README.md`, even though the snippet is already defined in the test file and shown in the sample markdown\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n**Edit** `sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/README.md`\\n\\n**Change 1 — Main classes section:** Add `AnalyzeUsageDetails` to the \\u0026#34;Main classes\\u0026#34; list.\\n\\nFind the existing block:\\n```markdown\\n### Main classes\\n\\n* **`ContentUnderstandingClient`** - The main client for analyzing content, as well as creating, managing, and configuring analyzers\\n* **`AnalysisResult`** - Contains the structured results of an analysis operation, including content elements, markdown, and metadata\\n```\\n\\nReplace with:\\n```markdown\\n### Main classes\\n\\n* **`ContentUnderstandingClient`** - The main client for analyzing content, as well as creating, managing, and configuring analyzers\\n* **`AnalysisResult`** - Contains the structured results of an analysis operation, including content elements, markdown, and metadata\\n* **`AnalyzeUsageDetails`** - Contains billing and token consumption details from a completed analyze operation. Retrieve via `AnalyzeOperationExtensions.GetUsage()` on a completed `Operation`.\\n```\\n\\n**Change 2 — Examples section:** Update the Sample 03 bullet to mention usage/billing details.\\n\\nFind:\\n```markdown\\n* **Domain-Specific Analysis** - Extract structured fields from invoices using `prebuilt-invoice`\\n```\\n\\nReplace with:\\n```markdown\\n* **Domain-Specific Analysis** - Extract structured fields from invoices using `prebuilt-invoice`, and retrieve usage/billing details (page counts, token consumption) via `AnalyzeOperationExtensions.GetUsage()`\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\nThe `ContentUnderstandingGetUsage` snippet is already defined in the test file at:\\n\\n`sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/tests/samples/Sample03_AnalyzeInvoice.cs`\\n\\nThe snippet is bounded by `#region Snippet:ContentUnderstandingGetUsage` / `#endregion`.\\n\\n**No new test code is needed.** The only change needed is adding the placeholder to README.md.\\n\\nAdd a new subsection in the README under the **Examples** heading (e.g., after the existing \\u0026#34;Analyze content\\u0026#34; bullet list) or within the \\u0026#34;Key concepts\\u0026#34; / \\u0026#34;Asynchronous operations\\u0026#34; section. but does not mention that Sample 03 now also demonstrates retrieving usage/billing details\\n- No snippet placeholder for `ContentUnderstandingGetUsage` exists in `README.md`, even though the snippet is already defined in the test file and shown in the sample markdown\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n**Edit** `sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/README.md`\\n\\n**Change 1 — Main classes section:** Add `AnalyzeUsageDetails` to the \\u0026#34;Main classes\\u0026#34; list.\\n\\nFind the existing block:\\n```markdown\\n### Main classes\\n\\n* **`ContentUnderstandingClient`** - The main client for analyzing content, as well as creating, managing, and configuring analyzers\\n* **`AnalysisResult`** - Contains the structured results of an analysis operation, including content elements, markdown, and metadata\\n```\\n\\nReplace with:\\n```markdown\\n### Main classes\\n\\n* **`ContentUnderstandingClient`** - The main client for analyzing content, as well as creating, managing, and configuring analyzers\\n* **`AnalysisResult`** - Contains the structured results of an analysis operation, including content elements, markdown, and metadata\\n* **`AnalyzeUsageDetails`** - Contains billing and token consumption details from a completed analyze operation. Retrieve via `AnalyzeOperationExtensions.GetUsage()` on a completed `Operation`.\\n```\\n\\n**Change 2 — Examples section:** Update the Sample 03 bullet to mention usage/billing details.\\n\\nFind:\\n```markdown\\n* **Domain-Specific Analysis** - Extract structured fields from invoices using `prebuilt-invoice`\\n```\\n\\nReplace with:\\n```markdown\\n* **Domain-Specific Analysis** - Extract structured fields from invoices using `prebuilt-invoice`, and retrieve usage/billing details (page counts, token consumption) via `AnalyzeOperationExtensions.GetUsage()`\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\nThe `ContentUnderstandingGetUsage` snippet is already defined in the test file at:\\n\\n`sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/tests/samples/Sample03_AnalyzeInvoice.cs`\\n\\nThe snippet is bounded by `#region Snippet:ContentUnderstandingGetUsage` / `#endregion`.\\n\\n**No new test code is needed.** The only change needed is adding the placeholder to README.md.\\n\\nAdd a new subsection in the README under the **Examples** heading (e.g., after the existing \\u0026#34;Analyze content\\u0026#34; bullet list) or within the \\u0026#34;Key concepts\\u0026#34; / \\u0026#34;Asynchronous operations\\u0026#34; section. Insert:\\n\\n```markdown\\n### Retrieve usage and billing details\\n\\nAfter an analyze operation completes, use `GetUsage()` to retrieve token and page consumption:\\n\\n```\\n```\\n```\\n\\n\\u0026gt; The `Update-Snippets.ps1` script will populate this placeholder automatically.\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\nThe README already contains all required sections (Getting started, Key concepts, Examples, Troubleshooting, Next steps, Contributing). No structural changes are needed beyond the targeted additions above.\\n\\n### Step 4: Validate\\n\\nRun these commands in order:\\n\\n1. `dotnet build sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/`\\n2. `dotnet test sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 contentunderstanding` — confirm that the `ContentUnderstandingGetUsage` placeholder in README.md is replaced with the code from `Sample03_AnalyzeInvoice.cs`\\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 contentunderstanding` — no public API changes are expected, but run to confirm the listing files are up to date\\n5. `dotnet format sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/`\\n\\n\\n\\n## Next Steps\\n\\n\\u0026gt;
